title: Tray.io Connector
description: A pre-built connector in the Tray.io platform that exposes the API operations of a third-party service.

name.description: The connector identifier (e.g., salesforce, slack, hubspot)

title.description: Human-readable display name of the connector

description.description: Description of what the connector does

icon.description: URL to the connector icon image

isLatest.description: Whether this is the latest available version
